text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year! Thanks for coming to our party!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has invited me to a New Year's
party held by the Satono Group.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's apparently a gathering for members of the
Satono family and affiliates of the Satono Group
to exchange greetings for the new year.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for dropping this on you so suddenly, but
my parents expressed that they would like to
make your acquaintance, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year! Thank you for taking such good
care of Dia.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
She's performed far better than we could have
imagined in her classic year, and I'm sure your
guidance played no small role in that.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Dia's intuition was spot-on. We hope
you'll continue guiding her toward success in her
senior year as well.
choice_data_list:
Thank you. I'll do all I can to make her into an
illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text: I've got great expectations for the both of you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I have to make the rounds and say hello to
everyone, so please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Please go ahead and enjoy yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her parents hold a central position within the
group. As their daughter, it seems Satono
Diamond also bears a significant amount of that
responsibility.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Former Coach
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Dia! You're really making a
name for yourself in the Twinkle Series, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Dia's Former Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You were such a small child, but now
you've grown into a remarkable individual. I'm
filled with pride every time I see you race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year. It's lovely to see you both
again.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've been able to improve my running from the
foundation that you both helped me set. I'm
eternally grateful for everything you've done for
me.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Former Coach
text_block_list.text:
To tell you the truth, I brag to my current
students about how I used to coach you! They're
always so impressed with me when I do!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, I'm honored. ♪ But you were already
well-known for your skills long before you ever
took me under your wing!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And you're a distinguished professor in the field of nutrition, Doctor. If anything, people envy me for having you and your team.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Former Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, what a charmer. You've become a
fantastic representative for the Satono Group!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you, but I still have much to learn.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm still trying to figure out what an "illustrious
runner" ought to do.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Former Coach
text_block_list.text:
An illustrious runner, eh? Well, you'd probably
need to consider running internationally one day,
wouldn't you?

text_block_list.name: Sporting Goods Sales Rep
text_block_list.text:
If you're thinking of competing overseas, our
company stocks training goods and shoes aimed
at the international market.

text_block_list.name: Sporting Goods Sales Rep
text_block_list.text:
We could even develop custom items specifically
for you, Miss Diamond. Please feel free to
contact us anytime.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The training equipment your company designed
for us still gets a lot of use in our house even now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Should I find myself in need of new equipment,
would it be all right to ask you to develop
something for me?

text_block_list.name: Sporting Goods Sales Rep
text_block_list.text:
But of course. After all, you are the shining star of
the Satono Group. We would be honored to do
our very utmost to assist you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I appreciate that. I'll be in
contact with you in the near future. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A top-class coach, a first-rate doctor, and the
backing of a sporting brand...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has been blessed with much
support since childhood. This just proves how
much people have always expected of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But such blessings come with a great deal of
responsibility. She must repay the support she has
received with concrete achievements, regardless
of her own dreams and desires.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to ensure she achieves success in her senior
year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the party, I head out with Satono Diamond
to go on our first shrine visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You prayed for quite a long time.
choice_data_list:
I was just reaffirming my commitments for the
year.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Are you talking about my races?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I would have liked to pray together with you in
that case...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But that's all right. I got to see you looking
incredibly serious instead, so I'll count that as a
win. ♪ Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What are your plans after this?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If you don't mind me asking, I'd like to hear how
you usually spend New Year's!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Both my family and Kita's customarily host huge
parties.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm interested in learning about different ways to
celebrate New Year's outside of parties and
banquets. And if it's all right, I'd love to join you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought we were simply chatting, but Satono
Diamond ends up deciding to spend the rest of
New Year's with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for how I usually spend the holiday...
choice_data_list: I usually go buy a lucky bag.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What? You mean, you just sleep through it? Is
that some kind of training to make your first
dream of the year a good one?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hastily explain that while I do occasionally hit
the sack early on New Year's, I meant I usually
stay at home and laze around.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so you start off your new year by loafing
about? That sounds so indulgent! ♪ Count me in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to set up camp in my office and eat
snacks while watching New Year's specials on TV.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
These people are walking an awful lot for being
on a bus tour...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: That eel lunch box looks scrumptious!
choice_data_list: Makes your mouth water, doesn't it?
Makes your mouth water, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It looks like they're open today, so why don't we
get some delivered?
choice_data_list: We're way too far from them to get delivery!
We're way too far from them to get delivery!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's no problem. We've both been working
really hard, so I'm sure my father will be happy to
help out with one little ask. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we fill our bellies with exquisitely
prepared eel lunch boxes, delivered swiftly to us
via bullet train.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: A lucky bag! How exciting! I want to buy one too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she's so eager to get one, the two of us
head to the local shopping mall together to pick
up a lucky bag.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I wonder which shop I should buy one from? Oh,
look! They have lucky bags with food and tea too!
choice_data_list: Want to give one of them a try, then?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Even if I'm not fond of all the food, I can
simply share it, after all! Let's go over there!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow, just look at this line... It seems we'll be
waiting a while, so why don't we play a game
while we wait?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's try to guess where everyone who passes by
is going!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Right, let's start with that man in the big jacket. I
think he's heading into the coffee shop.
choice_data_list:
I'm gonna say he's going to the bookstore on
the upper floor.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ah, he went in the coffee shop! Hehe, that's one
point to me! ♪ His tired face gave him away.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Playing a game really helped pass the time, didn't
it? Let's head home and see what we got in our
lucky bags!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending a fun time waiting in the line, we
each manage to snag a lucky bag!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
New Year's calligraphy, huh? In that case, I want
to try doing something on a big scale!
choice_data_list: You mean like a calligraphy performance?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I'll have someone from my household buy
us a giant brush and some calligraphy paper!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luckily, with it being the New Year's holidays,
nobody else is using the gym, so we're able to use
it for our giant calligraphy session!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I need to visualize the characters first, or
else the balance will be off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After standing in front of the paper to envision
the characters, she lifts a brush that's as tall as
she is, and dashes across the sheet.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: TAAAAKE THIS! AND THAT! HAH!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wheeew! What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The words "Wish Fulfillment" are written in
flowing and beautiful script across the paper!
